subject: FW: pilots
body:
________________________________

From: LVJET@aol.com [mailto:LVJET@aol.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, April 09, 2008 10:06 AM
To: Rahna Jalashgar
Cc: kellens@earthlink.net
Subject: pilots


Hello Rhana,
 
Tell JE I have Dave and Bill schedule to arrive in Newark at 4:30pm
today,,,,they will go straight to Teterboro
where Gulfstream is located, Meridean Aviation.  let me know the travel
plans since I will takecare of getting hotels and flight planning for
the guys since they are travel to NY ASAP.
thx
Larry V
 
ps this is your email Rhana right?



________________________________
